INFORMATION-TECHNOLOGY.title: Software Developer
INFORMATION-TECHNOLOGY.description: Designs, codes, and maintains software applications using various programming languages and frameworks.

INFORMATION-TECHNOLOGY.title: Web Developer
INFORMATION-TECHNOLOGY.description: Builds and maintains websites and web applications with frontend and backend technologies.

INFORMATION-TECHNOLOGY.title: IT Support Specialist
INFORMATION-TECHNOLOGY.description: Provides technical support, troubleshoots hardware/software issues, and maintains IT infrastructure.

BUSINESS-DEVELOPMENT.title: Business Development Manager
BUSINESS-DEVELOPMENT.description: Identifies growth opportunities, builds strategic partnerships, and drives revenue expansion.

BUSINESS-DEVELOPMENT.title: Sales Strategist
BUSINESS-DEVELOPMENT.description: Develops and implements sales strategies to achieve business objectives and market penetration.

BUSINESS-DEVELOPMENT.title: Marketing Coordinator
BUSINESS-DEVELOPMENT.description: Plans and executes marketing campaigns, manages brand communications, and analyzes market trends.

FINANCE.title: Financial Analyst
FINANCE.description: Analyzes financial data, prepares investment reports, and advises on financial planning decisions.

FINANCE.title: Investment Banker
FINANCE.description: Facilitates capital markets transactions, advises on mergers and acquisitions, and manages financial deals.

FINANCE.title: Risk Manager
FINANCE.description: Identifies, assesses, and mitigates financial and operational risks for organizations.

ENGINEERING.title: Civil Engineer
ENGINEERING.description: Designs and oversees construction of infrastructure projects including roads, bridges, and buildings.

ENGINEERING.title: Mechanical Engineer
ENGINEERING.description: Designs, develops, and tests mechanical systems, devices, and thermal equipment.

ENGINEERING.title: Electrical Engineer
ENGINEERING.description: Designs and develops electrical systems, circuits, and electronic components.

ADVOCATE.title: Attorney
ADVOCATE.description: Represents clients in legal proceedings, provides legal advice, and drafts legal documents.

ADVOCATE.title: Legal Consultant
ADVOCATE.description: Advises organizations on legal matters, regulatory compliance, and risk management.

ADVOCATE.title: Paralegal
ADVOCATE.description: Assists attorneys with case preparation, legal research, document drafting, and client communication.

CHEF.title: Executive Chef
CHEF.description: Leads kitchen operations, creates menus, manages food quality, and oversees culinary staff.

CHEF.title: Sous Chef
CHEF.description: Assists the head chef in kitchen management, food preparation, and staff supervision.

CHEF.title: Restaurant Manager
CHEF.description: Manages daily restaurant operations, staff scheduling, customer service, and financial performance.

ACCOUNTANT.title: Accountant
ACCOUNTANT.description: Manages financial records, prepares tax returns, and ensures compliance with financial regulations.

ACCOUNTANT.title: Auditor
ACCOUNTANT.description: Examines financial statements, evaluates internal controls, and ensures regulatory compliance.

ACCOUNTANT.title: Tax Consultant
ACCOUNTANT.description: Advises clients on tax planning strategies, compliance, and optimization of tax obligations.

FITNESS.title: Personal Trainer
FITNESS.description: Designs customized exercise programs, guides clients through workouts, and monitors fitness progress.

FITNESS.title: Fitness Director
FITNESS.description: Oversees fitness facility operations, develops wellness programs, and manages training staff.

FITNESS.title: Sports Coach
FITNESS.description: Trains athletes, develops game strategies, and builds team performance through coaching.

AVIATION.title: Airline Pilot
AVIATION.description: Operates aircraft, ensures flight safety, navigates routes, and communicates with air traffic control.

AVIATION.title: Aviation Technician
AVIATION.description: Inspects, repairs, and maintains aircraft systems to ensure airworthiness and safety compliance.

AVIATION.title: Flight Operations Manager
AVIATION.description: Coordinates flight schedules, manages crew assignments, and ensures operational compliance.

SALES.title: Sales Representative
SALES.description: Promotes and sells products or services, builds client relationships, and meets sales targets.

SALES.title: Account Manager
SALES.description: Manages key client accounts, ensures customer satisfaction, and identifies upselling opportunities.

SALES.title: Sales Director
SALES.description: Leads sales teams, develops revenue strategies, and drives business growth initiatives.

BANKING.title: Banking Officer
BANKING.description: Manages banking operations, processes transactions, and provides financial services to customers.

BANKING.title: Loan Officer
BANKING.description: Evaluates loan applications, assesses creditworthiness, and manages lending portfolios.

BANKING.title: Branch Manager
BANKING.description: Oversees bank branch operations, manages staff, and drives customer acquisition and retention.

CONSULTANT.title: Management Consultant
CONSULTANT.description: Advises organizations on strategy, operations, and organizational improvement initiatives.

CONSULTANT.title: Strategy Consultant
CONSULTANT.description: Analyzes market dynamics, develops competitive strategies, and guides business transformation.

CONSULTANT.title: Business Analyst
CONSULTANT.description: Evaluates business processes, gathers requirements, and recommends technology-driven solutions.

HEALTHCARE.title: Registered Nurse
HEALTHCARE.description: Provides patient care, administers medications, monitors health conditions, and supports recovery.

HEALTHCARE.title: Healthcare Administrator
HEALTHCARE.description: Manages healthcare facility operations, budgets, staff, and regulatory compliance.

HEALTHCARE.title: Medical Technologist
HEALTHCARE.description: Performs laboratory tests, analyzes biological samples, and aids in medical diagnosis.

CONSTRUCTION.title: Construction Manager
CONSTRUCTION.description: Plans and oversees construction projects, manages timelines, budgets, and on-site operations.

CONSTRUCTION.title: Site Engineer
CONSTRUCTION.description: Supervises construction activities, ensures structural integrity, and manages site safety.

CONSTRUCTION.title: Project Estimator
CONSTRUCTION.description: Calculates project costs, prepares bid proposals, and analyzes material and labor requirements.

PUBLIC-RELATIONS.title: PR Specialist
PUBLIC-RELATIONS.description: Manages public image, writes press releases, coordinates media relations, and handles crisis communication.

PUBLIC-RELATIONS.title: Communications Director
PUBLIC-RELATIONS.description: Oversees organizational communications strategy, media relations, and brand messaging.

PUBLIC-RELATIONS.title: Media Relations Manager
PUBLIC-RELATIONS.description: Builds relationships with journalists, coordinates press coverage, and manages media inquiries.

HR.title: HR Specialist
HR.description: Manages recruitment, employee relations, benefits administration, and workplace compliance.

HR.title: Recruiter
HR.description: Sources and screens candidates, conducts interviews, and manages the hiring pipeline.

HR.title: HR Manager
HR.description: Oversees human resources operations, develops policies, and manages employee development programs.

DESIGNER.title: Graphic Designer
DESIGNER.description: Creates visual designs for marketing materials, branding, and digital media using design tools.

DESIGNER.title: UX/UI Designer
DESIGNER.description: Designs user interfaces and experiences through research, wireframing, and usability testing.

DESIGNER.title: Creative Director
DESIGNER.description: Leads creative vision, directs design teams, and ensures brand consistency across projects.

ARTS.title: Art Director
ARTS.description: Oversees visual style and creative direction for productions, publications, or campaigns.

ARTS.title: Gallery Curator
ARTS.description: Selects and organizes art exhibitions, manages collections, and coordinates with artists.

ARTS.title: Visual Artist
ARTS.description: Creates original artwork using various media, develops artistic concepts, and exhibits works.

TEACHER.title: Elementary Teacher
TEACHER.description: Educates young students across subjects, develops lesson plans, and assesses student progress.

TEACHER.title: University Professor
TEACHER.description: Teaches higher education courses, conducts research, and mentors graduate students.

TEACHER.title: Curriculum Developer
TEACHER.description: Designs educational curricula, creates learning materials, and evaluates teaching effectiveness.

APPAREL.title: Fashion Designer
APPAREL.description: Designs clothing and accessories, creates patterns, and oversees production of fashion lines.

APPAREL.title: Merchandiser
APPAREL.description: Plans product assortments, manages inventory, and optimizes retail sales strategies.

APPAREL.title: Textile Specialist
APPAREL.description: Researches fabrics, evaluates material quality, and advises on textile selection for production.

DIGITAL-MEDIA.title: Social Media Manager
DIGITAL-MEDIA.description: Manages social media presence, creates content strategies, and engages with online audiences.

DIGITAL-MEDIA.title: Content Strategist
DIGITAL-MEDIA.description: Develops content plans, manages editorial calendars, and drives audience engagement.

DIGITAL-MEDIA.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
DIGITAL-MEDIA.description: Executes digital marketing campaigns, analyzes performance metrics, and optimizes ROI.

AGRICULTURE.title: Agricultural Scientist
AGRICULTURE.description: Conducts research on crop production, soil health, and sustainable farming practices.

AGRICULTURE.title: Farm Manager
AGRICULTURE.description: Oversees farm operations, manages workers, and ensures efficient crop and livestock production.

AGRICULTURE.title: Agronomist

AUTOMOBILE.title: Automotive Engineer
AUTOMOBILE.description: Designs and develops vehicle systems, conducts testing, and improves automotive technology.

AUTOMOBILE.title: Service Manager
AUTOMOBILE.description: Manages automotive service operations, oversees technicians, and ensures customer satisfaction.

AUTOMOBILE.title: Vehicle Inspector
AUTOMOBILE.description: Inspects vehicles for safety compliance, performs diagnostics, and certifies roadworthiness.

BPO.title: Operations Manager
BPO.description: Manages business process outsourcing operations, optimizes workflows, and ensures service quality.

BPO.title: Process Analyst
BPO.description: Analyzes business processes, identifies efficiency improvements, and implements automation solutions.

BPO.title: Customer Service Lead
BPO.description: Leads customer service teams, handles escalations, and develops service improvement strategies.
